description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image gitlab.informatik.uni-bremen.de:5005/turingcomplete/freedombone:latest with stages prepare, build, test, and deploy. Add a prepare‑stage job named "git update" that runs `git pull --rebase origin stretch && git checkout buster`. In the build stage add jobs: "build amd64" (echo then `freedombone-image -t amd64 -m http://www.fb3.uni-bremen.de/download/linux/debian/debian/`, artifacts path freedombone-main-all-amd64.img, only on tags), "build amd64meshclient" (echo then `freedombone-image -t amd64 -m http://www.fb3.uni-bremen.de/download/linux/debian/debian/ -v meshclient`, artifact freedombone-main-all-beaglebonegreen.img, only on tags), "build beaglebonegreen" (echo then `freedombone-image -t beaglebonegreen -m http://www.fb3.uni-bremen.de/download/linux/debian/debian/`, artifact freedombone-main-all-beaglebonegreen.img, only on tags), "build beaglebonegreenmesh" (echo then `freedombone-image -t beaglebonegreen -m http://www.fb3.uni-bremen.de/download/linux/debian/debian/ -v mesh`, artifact freedombone-main-all-beaglebonegreen.img, only on tags), "build qemu64" (echo then `freedombone-image -t qemu-x86_64 -m http://www.fb3.uni-bremen.de/download/linux/debian/debian/`, artifact freedombone-main-all-qemu-x86_64.img, only on tags), "build menuconfig" (export TERMINFO, echo it, then `sudo freedombone menuconfig --noninteractive your-test-domain-name.net`), and "build menuconfig-onion" (export TERMINFO, echo it, then `sudo freedombone menuconfig-onion --noninteractive`). In the test stage add "test epicyon" (echo, `freedombone addremove add epicyon`, echo, `freedombone addremove remove epicyon`), "test syncthing" (same pattern for syncthing) and "test2" (echo placeholder messages). Finally, add a deploy‑stage job "deploy1" that simply echoes a placeholder deploy command. All jobs run in their respective stages, the tagged‑only jobs trigger only on tag pipelines, and no caches or services are defined.
